name: Example Wellness Studio
brandPositioning: Structured one-on-one coaching for busy professionals who want a practical first step.

offer.name: Starter Clarity Package
offer.headline: Assessment + 3 coaching sessions
offer.proof: Assessment, written summary, and three guided sessions

policy: Do not imply that the viewer has a medical or mental-health condition.
Describe situations and support options instead of asserting personal attributes.
Do not use fake scarcity or unverified outcome claims.
Generate background imagery without readable text; Codex adds text later.

assets.note: Optional. Keep private brand files out of public forks unless licensed for sharing.
Optional reference image for human review or future edit workflows.

creativeAngles.message: Start with an assessment, then turn the result into three guided sessions.
creativeAngles.imageBrief: Warm desk scene, notebook and tea, calm morning light, lots of clean negative space, no readable text.

creativeAngles.message: A short intake and assessment helps turn vague stress into a concrete first plan.
creativeAngles.imageBrief: Realistic editorial photo of an organized desk after decluttering, soft green and cream palette, no logos, no readable text.

creativeAngles.message: Use a structured reflection report as the starting point for the next conversation.
creativeAngles.imageBrief: Abstract paper report layout with blank cards and subtle lines, no words, no symbols that imply diagnosis.

creativeAngles.message: The package gives both you and the coach a shared starting point before the conversation begins.
creativeAngles.imageBrief: Minimal studio interior with comfortable chair and side table, bright natural light, reassuring but professional, no readable text.
